# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Security updates will be applied to the latest release.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please report any suspected security vulnerabilities to [security@dishine.it](mailto:security@dishine.it) and do not disclose them publicly. You should receive a response within a few days and if confirmed the issue will be resolved as soon as possible.

For more details, see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) in the repository root.
